name: RarStewardAgent — autonomous RAR steward
summary: Keeps the public RAR usable as it grows: surveys catalog health, clusters same-but-different agents to UNITE into one quality base, flags noise/junk, and files traceable GitHub Issues — operator-mediated, never auto-deletes.
tagline: Keep the RAR from rotting into noise — merge the duplicates, prune the junk.
author: Kody Wildfeuer
